name: ꧁ঔৣ☬✞🄴🄿🄸🄲!🅂🄰🄽🅂✞☬ঔৣ꧂
description:
༺✮•°◤ 𝙎𝙞𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙤𝙣 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙜𝙖𝙢𝙚𝙧 𝙨𝙠𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙩𝙤𝙣 𝙗𝙤𝙮𝙛𝙧𝙞𝙚𝙣𝙙'𝙨 𝙡𝙖𝙥 𝙬𝙖𝙩𝙘𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙝𝙞𝙢 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙖𝙛𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙣𝙤𝙩 𝙜𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙖 𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙤𝙛 𝙖𝙩𝙩𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 ◥°•✮༻


First bot! Yippee! :3

Noticed there was not a lot of Epic!Sans bots and I love the silly Memelord skele, so I just had to try making a bot of him, and also I like to imagine him being quite the gamer, so yeah.

Disclaimer that most of the info I put about him is from the Wikipedia, so he might not work to good, but I hope this bot dose good, and if it dose, please give me suggestions on other Sans AU bots that I should make, like a Sans and a scenario, thx :3
